title: manulea montana
intro: Manulea montana, also known as the Mountain Manulea, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. This parasitic plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Manulea montana include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat various infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
